name: Job Search Automation - AI Matching & Cover Letters

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'You are a job matching expert for software engineering roles. You analyze job descriptions against a candidate's resume and provide a precise compatibility score. Always respond with valid JSON only, no markdown, no code blocks.

CANDIDATE RESUME:
' + $('Set Job Preferences').first().json.resumeText + '

JOB POSTING:
Title: ' + $json.title + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '

Analyze this job against the candidate's resume. Consider: tech stack match, seniority level, role type (backend vs full-stack), and required experience. Respond with ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "score": 0-100,
  "matchReason": "2-3 sentences on why this is a good/bad match",
  "missingSkills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "keyMatchingSkills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "experienceFit": "under-qualified|good-fit|over-qualified",
  "recommendation": "strong-apply|apply|maybe|skip"
}' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.7 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'You are an expert cover letter writer for software engineering roles. Write concise, compelling cover letters under 300 words. Be professional but personable. Every sentence must be specific to the job and candidate. No generic filler. Do NOT use markdown formatting.

CANDIDATE RESUME:
' + $('Set Job Preferences').first().json.resumeText + '

JOB DETAILS:
Title: ' + $json.title + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '
Key matching skills: ' + ($json.keyMatchingSkills || []).join(', ') + '

Write a tailored cover letter addressed to "Hiring Manager" at ' + $json.company + '.
Focus on the specific technologies mentioned in the job description.
Respond with ONLY the cover letter text, no JSON, no markdown.' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.7 } }) }}
